This expressionist painting depicts a bare-chested lady dancing on a beach, with a centaur next to her playing the flute and goats dancing with her. This painting has a French name depicting the happiness of living.
Joie de Vivre was by this Spanish artist. Other notable examples of expressionism from this artist include The Weeping Woman and Le Rêve.

Joie de Vivre was by this Spanish artist. Other notable examples of expressionism from this artist include The Weeping Woman and Le Reve.

parts: In a promotional poster for the film Melancholia, actress Kirsten Dunst lies in a wedding dress holding a bouquet of flowers, in a similar position and location to the title woman from an 1852 painting by John Everett Millais.
This artist is a common interest between Anna Scott and Will Thacker in Notting Hill. Will had a print of this artist’s La Marièe while Anna had the original, which she would eventually give to Will.
A musical based on this painting by George Seurat originally starred Mandy Patinkin and Bernadette Peters. This painting would also be admired by Cameron in Ferris Bueller's Day Off.

65fa491be210b3e07c6de8b5.leadin: Percussion instruments are key to providing rhythm and adding complexity in an arrangement. For ten points each, answer the following questions about instruments in the percussion section.
65fa491be210b3e07c6de8b5.leadin_sanitized: Percussion instruments are key to providing rhythm and adding complexity in an arrangement. For ten points each, answer the following questions about instruments in the percussion section.
parts: This percussion instrument, also known as a kettledrum, is made of a copper bowl with a membrane stretched over it. These drums are tuned and typically appear in orchestras in sets of four or five.
This member of the mallet family consists of wooden bars with resonators underneath. This instrument has a wider range than xylophones and uses octave tuning.

Under the Hornbostel-Sachs system, timpani and most other drums are classified as membranophones under the Hornbostel-Sachs system. This other percussion category contains, in addition to marimbas, the triangle and maracas.
